name: codex-qq-bridge
description: Bidirectional QQ and AstrBot bridge for running local Codex and sending progress, images, and voice back to QQ.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge QQ chat and local Codex runs
interface.longDescription: Runs a local Node bridge and AstrBot plugin so authorized QQ messages can invoke Codex, see live progress, send image inputs, and receive text, image, or voice replies.
defaultPrompt: Set up QQ so I can call Codex remotely.
Check whether the QQ bridge is healthy.
Package QQ progress and voice replies.
